understanding.goal_understanding: Complete each level by placing all selectable pieces onto the goal tiles marked with '+' at the same time; when every goal is occupied simultaneously the level reports WIN, and finishing all levels wins the whole game within the per-level step budget.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: The currently controlled selectable is identified by player.id/position and moves in 3-pixel grid increments with MOVE_* actions. Movement can be blocked by walls/boundaries or by adjacent objects; some adjacent objects are pushable blocks that can be pushed if space allows. Levels may contain multiple selectables; control is switched using CLICK on the exact pixel coordinates of another selectable (as listed in objects/selectables). The movement.*_blocked flags are only hints and don’t guarantee success/failure, so attempted moves are sometimes needed to learn actual collision behavior.
